mapper.sql: SELECT OH.CTKEY /* 센터 */ , OH.OWKEY /* 화주 */ , CM.POINT /* 거점코드 */ , OCD.OWCDDTNM /* 거점명 */ , OH.OBREQUESTDATE /* 출고예정일자 */ , COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE <> '25' THEN OH.STORE_KEY ELSE NULL END) AS STORE_CNT /* 시판건과 거래처수 */ , COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE <> '25' THEN OH.ORHDKEY ELSE NULL END) AS ORDER_CNT /* 시판건과 오더수 */ , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE <> '25' THEN RT.ROLL_CNT ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ROLL_CNT /* 시판건과 롤테이너수 */ , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE <> '25' THEN OH.EX_BOX_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ORDER_BOX_QTY /* 시판건과 주문수량(BOX) */ , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE <> '25' THEN OH.EX_BOL_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ORDER_BOL_QTY /* 시판건과 주문수량(BOL) */ , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE <> '25' THEN OH.AL_BOX_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS AL_BOX_QTY /* 시판건과 주문수량(BOX) */ , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE <> '25' THEN OH.AL_BOL_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS AL_BOL_QTY /* 시판건과 주문수량(BOL) */ , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE <> '25' THEN OH.PI_BOX_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PI_BOX_QTY /* 시판건과 피킹수량(BOX) */ , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE <> '25' THEN OH.PI_BOL_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PI_BOL_QTY /* 시판건과 피킹수량(BOL) */ , COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE = '25' THEN OH.STORE_KEY ELSE NULL END) AS B_STORE_CNT /* 베이커리 거래처수 */ , COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE = '25' THEN OH.ORHDKEY ELSE NULL END) AS B_ORDER_CNT /* 베이커리 오더수 */ , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE = '25' THEN RT.ROLL_CNT ELSE 0 END), 0) AS B_ROLL_CNT /* 베이커리 롤테이너수 */ , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE = '25' THEN OH.EX_BOX_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS B_ORDER_BOX_QTY /* 시판건과 주문수량(BOX) */ , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE = '25' THEN OH.EX_EA_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS B_ORDER_EA_QTY /* 시판건과 주문수량(EA) */ , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE = '25' THEN OH.AL_BOX_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS B_AL_BOX_QTY /* 시판건과 주문수량(BOX) */ , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE = '25' THEN OH.AL_EA_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS B_AL_EA_QTY /* 시판건과 주문수량(EA) */ , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE = '25' THEN OH.PI_BOX_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS B_PI_BOX_QTY /* 시판건과 피킹수량(BOX) */ , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBHDTYPE = '25' THEN OH.PI_EA_QTY ELSE 0 END), 0) AS B_PI_EA_QTY /* 시판건과 피킹수량(EA) */ FROM (SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.ORHDKEY , OH.OBHDTYPE , OH.OBREQUESTDATE AS OBREQUESTDATE , OH.STORE_KEY , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'BOX' THEN OD.INITQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS EX_BOX_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'BOL' THEN OD.INITQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS EX_BOL_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'EA' THEN OD.INITQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS EX_EA_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'BOX' THEN OD.ALQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS AL_BOX_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'BOL' THEN OD.ALQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS AL_BOL_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'EA' THEN OD.ALQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS AL_EA_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'BOX' THEN OD.PIQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS PI_BOX_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'BOL' THEN OD.PIQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS PI_BOL_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'EA' THEN OD.PIQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS PI_EA_QTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON OD.CTKEY = ICUT.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND OD.ICUTKEY = ICUT.ICUTKEY AND OD.UOM = ICUT.ICUTTYPE WHERE OH.WKSTATUS <> '99' AND OH.OBHDTYPE <> '180' GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.ORHDKEY , OH.OBHDTYPE , OH.OBREQUESTDATE , OH.STORE_KEY ) OH LEFT JOIN (SELECT ROLL.SHPMNO , COUNT(DISTINCT ROLL.ROLL_NUMBER) AS ROLL_CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TT_SHPM_DETL_ROLL_T ROLL ON OH.ORHDKEY = ROLL.SHPMNO WHERE ROLL.ROLL_NUMBER IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ROLL.SHPMNO ) RT ON OH.ORHDKEY = RT.SHPMNO LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER CM ON OH.OWKEY = CM.OWKEY AND OH.STORE_KEY = CM.ACKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_OWCD_DT OCD ON CM.OWKEY = OCD.OWKEY AND OCD.OWCDHDKEY = '10025' AND OCD.LAKEY = 'KOR' AND CM.POINT = OCD.OWCDDTKEY GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , CM.POINT , OCD.OWCDDTNM , OH.OBREQUESTDATE ORDER BY OBREQUESTDATE , POINT

SELECT T1.CTKEY /* 센터코드 */ , T1.OWKEY /* 화주코드 */ , T1.OBHDTYPE /* 출고유형코드 */ , T1.POINT /* 거래처코드 */ , T1.OBHDTYPE_DESC /* 출고유형명 */ , T1.OWCDDTNM /* 거래처명 */ , T1.TODAY_STORE_CNT /* 당일 - 거래처수 */ , T1.TODAY_ORDER_CNT /* 당일 - 오더수 */ , T1.TODAY_BOX_QTY /* 당일 - BOX 수량 */ , T1.TODAY_BOL_QTY /* 당일 - BOL 수량 */ , T1.TODAY_EA_QTY /* 당일 - EA 수량 */ , T2.TOTAL_STORE_CNT /* 당월누계 - 거래처수 */ , T2.TOTAL_ORDER_CNT /* 당월누계 - 오더수 */ , T1.TOTAL_BOX_QTY /* 당월누계 - BOX 수량 */ , T1.TOTAL_BOL_QTY /* 당월누계 - BOL 수량 */ , T1.TOTAL_EA_QTY /* 당월누계 - EA 수량 */ FROM (SELECT T.CTKEY , T.OWKEY , T.OBHDTYPE , T.POINT , CD.OWCDDTNM AS OBHDTYPE_DESC , T.OWCDDTNM , COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T.OBREQUESTDATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{obrequestdate}, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') THEN T.STORE_KEY ELSE NULL END) AS TODAY_STORE_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T.OBREQUESTDATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{obrequestdate}, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') THEN T.ORHDKEY ELSE NULL END) AS TODAY_ORDER_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN T.OBREQUESTDATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{obrequestdate}, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') AND T.UOM = 'BOX' THEN UINT_CFQTY ELSE 0 END) AS TODAY_BOX_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN T.OBREQUESTDATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{obrequestdate}, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') AND T.UOM = 'BOL' THEN UINT_CFQTY ELSE 0 END) AS TODAY_BOL_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN T.OBREQUESTDATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{obrequestdate}, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD') AND T.UOM = 'EA' THEN UINT_CFQTY ELSE 0 END) AS TODAY_EA_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN T.UOM = 'BOX' THEN UINT_CFQTY ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_BOX_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN T.UOM = 'BOL' THEN UINT_CFQTY ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_BOL_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN T.UOM = 'EA' THEN UINT_CFQTY ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_EA_QTY FROM (SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , CM.POINT , OCD.OWCDDTNM , SUBSTR(OH.OBREQUESTDATE, 1, 8) AS OBREQUESTDATE , OH.STORE_KEY , OD.UOM , OD.CFQTY , OD.CFQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY AS UINT_CFQTY , OH.OBHDTYPE , OH.ORHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON OD.CTKEY = ICUT.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND OD.ICUTKEY = ICUT.ICUTKEY AND OD.UOM = ICUT.ICUTTYPE INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER CM ON OH.OWKEY = CM.OWKEY AND OH.STORE_KEY = CM.ACKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OWCD_DT OCD ON CM.OWKEY = OCD.OWKEY AND OCD.OWCD_HDKEY = '10025' AND OCD.LAKEY = 'KOR' AND CM.POINT = OCD.OWCD_DTKEY WHERE OH.WKSTATUS <> '99' AND OH.OBHDTYPE <> '180' AND OH.OBREQUESTDATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{obrequestdate}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{obrequestdate}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') || '235959' ) T INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD ON T.CTKEY = CD.CTKEY AND CD.CTCD_HDKEY = 'OBHDTYPE' AND CD.LAKEY = 'KOR' AND CD.CTCD_DTKEY = T.OBHDTYPE GROUP BY T.CTKEY , T.OWKEY , T.POINT , T.OWCDDTNM , T.OBHDTYPE , CD.OWCDDTNM ) T1 INNER JOIN (SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDTYPE , POINT , SUM(TOTAL_STORE_CNT) AS TOTAL_STORE_CNT , SUM(TOTAL_ORDER_CNT) AS TOTAL_ORDER_CNT FROM (SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDTYPE , CM.POINT , SUBSTR(OH.OBREQUESTDATE, 1, 8) , COUNT(DISTINCT OH.STORE_KEY) AS TOTAL_STORE_CNT , COUNT(DISTINCT OH.ORHDKEY) AS TOTAL_ORDER_CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER CM ON OH.OWKEY = CM.OWKEY AND OH.STORE_KEY = CM.ACKEY WHERE OH.WKSTATUS <> '99' AND OH.OBHDTYPE <> '180' AND OH.OBREQUESTDATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{obrequestdate}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000' AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{obrequestdate}, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') || '235959' GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDTYPE , CM.POINT , SUBSTR(OH.OBREQUESTDATE, 1, 8) ) GROUP BY CTKEY , OWKEY , OBHDTYPE , POINT ) T2 ON T1.CTKEY = T2.CTKEY AND T1.OWKEY = T2.OWKEY AND T1.OBHDTYPE = T2.OBHDTYPE AND T1.POINT = T2.POINT ORDER BY T1.OBHDTYPE , T1.POINT
